_comment: Opportunity: Collapsed Secret Realm. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 10000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Nascent Soul), perception (Spirit Severing (to navigate the collapse)), and luck (modifier 0.6). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Collapsed Secret Realm
description: A secret realm that has partially collapsed, exposing its contents. Exists because: secret realms are unstable and can collapse.
why_untaken: Extremely dangerous; collapse can kill Spirit Severing cultivators.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
